name: Jam-Filled Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
2. In a small bowl, lightly beat eggs; add milk, butter, and lemon peel.
3. Pour the egg mixture into the dry ingredients and stir just until moistened.
4. Spoon half of the batter into 12 greased or paper-lined muffin cups.
5. Make a well in the center of each cup; add jam.
6. Spoon remaining batter over the jam.
7. Bake at 400°F for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
Yields: 1 dozen
From: Taste of Home Magazine
Posted by: Debbie Carlson (PHHW01A) - Prodigy
